nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 69, with temperatures rising to around 72 overnight. North wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Sunny then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 3pm. Sunny. High near 94, with temperatures falling to around 92 in the afternoon. East northeast wind 7 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3am. Partly cloudy. Low around 69, with temperatures rising to around 73 overnight. South southeast wind 12 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Mostly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between noon and 3pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 94. Northwest wind 5 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Wednesday Night
nws.shortForecast: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely then Mostly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely before midnight. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 64. West northwest wind 2 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 17 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely after noon. Partly sunny, with a high near 90. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 9pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms between 9pm and midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 63.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 67.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Partly Cloudy
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 68.

nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after noon. Mostly sunny, with a high near 98.

nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before midnight. Partly cloudy, with a low around 67.
